---
title: ggplot2
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  eval = TRUE
)
```

******************************************************************************************

## Links


******************************************************************************************

Ggplot 45 degree axis labels

Ggplot rbind/cbind plots to make the axes line up

Ggplot position dodge same width

Ggmap examples
